channel.title: python on е“‡е“€е“€plusз›ђ
channel.description: Recent content in python on е“‡е“€е“€plusз›ђ

item.title: classmethod and super
item.description: д»Јз Ѓ class time(object): def __init__(self, year): super(time, self).__init__() self.year = year print(self.year) вЂ‹ # a class method to create a time that one day following the data 'year' @classmethod def tomorrow(cls,year): print(type(cls)) # >>> в–І Pythonж‰Ђжњ‰з±»йѓЅз»§ж‰їи‡Є`<class 'type'>`пјЊеЊ…ж‹¬ж–°ејЏз±»`object` return cls(year+1) вЂ‹ # a static method to check whether the given data 'year' is after 2000. @staticmethod def twoThoundYear(year): return year>2000 вЂ‹ @classmethod def class_name(cls): return cls.__name__ вЂ‹ if __name__ == '__main__': t1 = time(1999) t2 = time.
